hero.title: Gallop into 2026 Photo Effect
hero.subtitle: Bring your photo to life with the Gallop into 2026 PixVerse template. Upload a picture and get a bold, share-ready result in seconds.

features.title: Template-powered transformation
features.description: Apply the Gallop into 2026 PixVerse template to your photo in a single click.

features.title: One photo in, instant results
features.description: Just upload one image and let the template do the heavy lifting.

features.title: Share-ready quality
features.description: Get a crisp output you can post or download right away.

steps.title: 1. Upload a photo
steps.description: Choose a clear image from your device.

steps.title: 2. Apply the template
steps.description: Click generate to apply the Gallop into 2026 effect.

steps.title: 3. Download and share
steps.description: Save the result or share it on social media.

items.question: What is Gallop into 2026?
items.answer: It is a PixVerse image template that transforms your photo into a themed 2026-style visual.

items.question: How many credits does it cost?
items.answer: Each Gallop into 2026 generation costs 30 credits.

items.question: Can I use the result commercially?
items.answer: Yes, results can be used for personal and commercial purposes.
